events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May was born on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the iconic Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger was born on July 26, 1943, in Dartford, Kent.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Icon
angles.copy: Sir Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday today! Six decades in and still rolling. What's your go-to Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched in the US
events.blurb: Music Television, MTV, launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV burst onto screens with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did it really kill the radio star, or just give us more to talk about?

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe'
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, in the UK, becoming a landmark of Britpop.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Thirty-two years ago, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the game. What's your favourite track from this iconic debut?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, an iconic counterculture event, took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million people gathered for '3 Days of Peace & Music' at Woodstock. Which legendary performance still gives you chills?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', passed away on August 16, 1977, at the age of 42. He would have been 91.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, who we lost 49 years ago today. His music and legacy continue to shape generations.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Influential rapper Tupac Shakur was tragically shot in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996, and died on September 13, 1996, at the age of 25. He would have been 55.

angles.name: Tupac Remembered
angles.copy: Thirty years since the music world lost a true icon. Remembering Tupac Shakur and his unparalleled impact on hip-hop and culture.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Guitar virtuoso Jimi Hendrix died on September 18, 1970, in London at the age of 27. He would have been 83.

angles.name: Legendary Guitarist
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled Jimi Hendrix, who passed away 56 years ago today. His influence on music is immeasurable.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road'
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released in the UK on September 26, 1969, and in the US on October 1, 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago this month, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That zebra crossing photo is still one of the most famous album covers ever.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders frontwoman Chrissie Hynde was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Pretenders Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! What's your favourite Pretenders track?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher was born on September 21, 1972, in Manchester.

angles.name: Mad For It
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite lyric from the man himself?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released as UK single
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic song 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK on October 24, 1975, to promote his 'Shaved Fish' compilation album.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Forty-nine years ago, John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK. A powerful message that still resonates today.

events.title: Apple launched the first iPod
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music with '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: Remember when the first iPod dropped? Twenty-five years ago, Apple changed how we listened to music forever. What was the first song you loaded onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: 007 Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Raise a martini (shaken, not stirred) to 007. Who's your favourite Bond, and what's the ultimate Bond theme song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles co-founder John Lennon was born on October 9, 1940, in Liverpool.

angles.name: Remembering Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the incredible John Lennon. His music and message of peace live on.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: English actor, comedian, and writer John Cleese, best known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, was born on October 27, 1939.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the incomparable John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty Towers, a true master of British comedy.
